CONTENT.Career: Maycon began playing for Corinthians academy at the age of twelve and had a very successful campaign. He won the 2014 and 2015 U20 Campeonato Paulista, 2014 U20 Campeonato Brasileiro, the 2015 Copa São Paulo de Futebol Júnior, including scoring the winning goal during the final.Maycon made his professional debut on 11 February 2016, as he started on Corinthians 2–1 victory against Capivariano at Arena Corinthians. He scored his first goal in a 3–0 away win against Botafogo-SP on March 13.On 14 July, Maycon was loaned to fellow Série A club Ponte Preta.On 17 June 2018 Maycon was transferred to Ukrainian Premier League club Shakhtar Donetsk and signed 5-year contract.On 31 March 2022, Shakhtar Donetsk confirmed that Maycon had joined Corinthians on loan until the end of 2022.
CONTENT.Honours: CorinthiansCampeonato Brasileiro Série A: 2017Campeonato Paulista: 2017, 2018Shakhtar DonetskUkrainian Premier League: 2018–19, 2019–20Ukrainian Cup: 2018–19Ukrainian Super Cup: 2021
CONTENT.External links: Maycon at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)

SUMMARY: Maycon de Andrade Barberan (born 15 July 1997), known as just Maycon, is a Brazilian footballer who plays as midfielder for Brazilian side Corinthians, on loan from Ukrainian side Shakhtar Donetsk.
